title: What's new with Gemini from Google DeepMind
summary: Google DeepMind presented updates to Gemini including upgraded model reasoning, expanded context window processing, and enhanced multimodal tool use. The presentation showcased workflows for building agentic applications with Gemini on Vertex AI and discussed research advancements in agent design.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech covers Google DeepMind's latest updates to Gemini: upgraded model reasoning, an expanded context window, and improved multimodal tool use. The session demonstrates workflows for building agentic applications with Gemini on Vertex AI and reviews research advances in agent design. The takeaways center on how the larger context window and stronger tool use feed into practical agent development, with Vertex AI as the deployment surface.
